comprehensive_rca.summary:
Root Cause Analysis for rrc_setup_failure in RRC layer

Specification Context:
This functionality is governed by 3GPP 38.331 - NR; Radio Resource Control (RRC) protocol specification. 
Recommended Fixes:
- Add detailed logging around error location
- Check input parameters and error handling
- Review recent code changes in affected components
- Add unit tests to verify correct behavior

Impact Assessment:
- User Experience: high impact
- System Performance: medium impact
- System Stability: medium impact
- Cascade Effects: This issue may affect the following layers:
  * NGAP: Issues in RRC can propagate to NGAP layer, affecting its functionality
  * F1AP: Issues in RRC can propagate to F1AP layer, affecting its functionality
fix_recommendations: Add detailed logging around error location
Check input parameters and error handling
Review recent code changes in affected components
Add unit tests to verify correct behavior

cascade_effects.description: Issues in RRC can propagate to NGAP layer, affecting its functionality
Issues in RRC can propagate to F1AP layer, affecting its functionality

ai_analysis.root_cause: RRC connection establishment failure in RRC layer. This indicates an issue during the RRC setup procedure. Common causes include ASN.1 encoding/decoding errors, UE capability mismatch, or resource allocation failures.
function_analysis: Verify resource allocation during RRC setup
